title: Project-scoped npm publish auth (no global dotfile dependency)
description: Publish auth scoped to this project via a gitignored src/.npmrc env-var ref (//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${TO_EXECUTION_NPM_TOKEN}); token sourced from the macOS Keychain (service npm-personal-token, account $USER) at publish time; neither depends on nor clobbers the global ~/.npmrc; recipe documented in root RELEASE.md.
acceptance_criteria: src/.npmrc exists with exactly the env-var-ref line (no literal token) and is gitignored (git check-ignore matches)
token authenticates as brooksryan via the PROJECT src/.npmrc (proven: control E401 with env unset + global neutralized; live whoami → brooksryan)
no secret committed; .npmrc absent from the published tarball (package-qa: 4 guards confirmed)
[DEFERRED] 2FA-bypass on publish verified on the next real release — see follow-up issue
notes: Intended for next sprint (Brooks, 2026-06-08). Surfaced by packager during EXEC-033. Re-scoped 2026-06-09 from ~/.npmrc-restore to project-scoped auth (Brooks). Mechanism built + package-qa-clean + auth-proven; 2FA-bypass-on-write deferred to next real publish (follow-up issue). Recipe in root RELEASE.md.
